svg.title: Mac-local admin panel scraper stack
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing all tools and where they live on your Mac

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up a Python project in VS Code on Mac?')
sendPrompt('How do I install Playwright on Mac?')
sendPrompt('How do I use a .env file in Python with python-dotenv?')
sendPrompt('Should I use APScheduler or launchd cron jobs on Mac?')
sendPrompt('How do I use pandas to process and compare scraped data?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Streamlit dashboard with charts and KPI cards?')
sendPrompt('How do I send a Slack or email alert from Python when a metric changes?')
sendPrompt('What Supabase tables should I create to store scraped admin panel data?')
sendPrompt('How do I store KPI metrics over time in Supabase?')
sendPrompt('How do I store and query alerts history in Supabase?')
